mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, billing_key, customer_key, provider, status, card_company, masked_card_number, issued_at, expired_at FROM billing_key WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, billing_key, customer_key, provider, status, card_company, masked_card_number, issued_at, expired_at FROM billing_key WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT bk.id, bk.user_id, bk.billing_key, bk.customer_key, bk.provider, bk.status, bk.card_company, bk.masked_card_number, bk.issued_at, bk.expired_at FROM billing_key bk INNER JOIN party_member pm ON pm.user_id = bk.user_id WHERE pm.party_id = #{partyId} AND pm.role = 'MEMBER' AND pm.status = 'PENDING' AND bk.status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_key SET billing_key = #{billingKey}, card_company = #{cardCompany}, masked_card_number = #{maskedCardNumber}, issued_at = NOW(), status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE id = #{id}
